mapper.insert: insert into app_version(serial_number,name, file_url, `release`, is_publish, remark,create_time) values (#{data.serialNumber}, #{data.name},#{data.fileUrl}, #{data.release}, #{data.isPublish},#{data.remark}, now())
mapper.update:
update app_version
serial_number = #{data.serialNumber},
file_url = #{data.fileUrl},
`release` = #{data.release},
is_publish = #{data.isPublish},
name = #{data.name},
remark = #{data.remark},
where id = #{data.id}
mapper.select:
select * from app_version
delete_time is null
order by `release` desc
select * from `app_version` where `is_publish` = 0 and `release` > #{nowRelease} and delete_time is null order by `release` desc limit 1
